text: The storm lives, and it fights to protect, or hide, the sanctuary.
Lightning arcs with purpose, striking with the crack of a Titan's whip.
Skyrath, the great dragon, becomes a living shield.
His scales smoke and crack under the barrage, his pained roar lost in the thunder.
Kale guides him by instinct alone, her trust in him absolute.
They are two souls against the wrath of the mountain, inching ever closer to the peak,
